name: Zhejiang Xinao Textiles Inc.
summary: Zhejiang Xinao Textiles Inc. researches and develops, produces, and sells worsted yarn and intermediate products of wool tops in China. Its products are primarily used in the downstream textile apparel brands. The company was formerly known as Zhejiang Xinao textiles Group Company LTD. and changed its name to Zhejiang Xinao Textiles Inc. in December 2007. Zhejiang Xinao Textiles Inc. was founded in 1991 and is based in Tongxiang City, China.
